race.comment: CHOCECLAIR (7) is close to breaking through after three consecutive placings at the track. Has the handy 2kg claim and back slightly in trip deserves another chance. IGOTMYMINDONYOU (3) has switched from a Victorian yard on a 42-day return. Races forward and his best from would see him right in the finish. Has a low gate and Butler is a positive jockey engagement. FRED'S MEMORY (4) was in the firing line on the turn but found one better here first-up. Has plenty of scope for improvement and he can get some of the money. ELEGANT LUCY (12) rates similarly on her Dalby placing over this trip. Peaks and will be around the mark. CONQUER DAT (1) went close from the speed at Warwick over shorter and is likely to give a sight.
